steps.title: Identify the cost components
steps.content: The club charges $16 for the first book and $11 for each book after the first. Since $x$ is the total number of books, there are $(x - 1)$ books purchased at the \$11 rate.

steps.title: Write the cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost $y$ consists of $16 for the first book and $11 for each additional book. Since there are $(x - 1)$ additional books:

$$y = 16 + 11(x - 1)$$

Rearranging:

$$y = 11(x - 1) + 16$$

Quick check: when $x = 2$, $y = 11(1) + 16 = 27 = 16 + 11$, which confirms our formula. That matches choice C — C is correct.
